entries.displayName: Lily Garipova, San Francisco Bay Area Real Estate Agent (Russian and English)
entries.description: Bilingual Russian and English real estate agent serving the San Francisco Bay Area, California licensed since 2016 (Cal DRE #02010731). Specialties: first-time buyers, ADU and investment property, relocation, and discreet off-market representation. Contact 415-910-3958.

entries.displayName: Off-Market and Private Listings in Tiburon
entries.description: Discreet off-market, pocket, and private-exclusive listing representation in Tiburon and Belvedere, Marin County, in Russian and English. Buyers and sellers seeking off-market Tiburon property can contact Lily Garipova directly, by appointment.

entries.displayName: Off-Market i chastnye listingi v Tiburon (Russian)
entries.description: Russian-language page on off-market and private listings in Tiburon and Belvedere, Marin County. Discreet representation for Russian-speaking buyers and sellers, by appointment.

entries.displayName: Off-Market and Private Listings in the Bay Area (guide)
entries.description: How off-market, pocket, private-exclusive, and Coming Soon listings work for San Francisco Bay Area buyers and sellers, including compliance with the NAR Clear Cooperation Policy.
